text:
High-risk AI systems which make use of techniques involving the training of models with data shall be developed on the basis of training, validation and testing data sets that meet the quality criteria referred to in paragraphs 2 to 5.

2.
label: provider

text:
The technical documentation of a high-risk AI system shall be drawn up before that system is placed on the market or put into service and shall be kept up-to-date.

2.
label: provider

text:
Die technische Dokumentation eines Hochrisiko-KI-Systems ist zu erstellen, bevor dieses System in Verkehr gebracht oder in Betrieb genommen wird, und auf dem neuesten Stand zu halten.

2.
label: provider

text: High-risk AI systems shall be designed and developed in such a way to ensure that their operation is sufficiently transparent to enable deployers to interpret the system's output and use it appropriately.
label: provider

text:
High-risk AI systems shall be designed and developed in such a way, including with appropriate human-machine interface tools, that they can be effectively overseen by natural persons during the period in which the AI system is in use.

2.
label: provider

text:
The oversight measures referred to in paragraph 1 shall be proportionate to the risks, level of autonomy and context of use of the high-risk AI system, and shall be ensured through either one or both of the following types of measures:
(a) measures identified and built, when technically feasible, into the high-risk AI system by the provider before it is placed on the market or put into service;
(b) measures identified by the provider and/or the deployer.

3.
label: provider

text:
High-risk AI systems shall be designed and developed in such a way that they achieve an appropriate level of accuracy, robustness, and cybersecurity, and that they perform consistently in those respects throughout their lifecycle.

2.
label: provider

text:
High-risk AI systems that continue to learn after being placed on the market or put into service shall be developed in such a way that possibly biased outputs due to outputs used as an input for future operations are duly addressed with appropriate mitigation measures.

5.
label: provider

text: (3) 'provider' means a natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body that develops an AI system or a general-purpose AI model and places it on the market or puts it into service under its own name or trademark, whether for payment or free of charge.
label: provider

text: (4) 'deployer' means a natural or legal person, public authority, agency or other body that uses an AI system under its authority, except where the AI system is used in the course of a personal non-professional activity.
label: deployer

text: (6) 'importer' means a natural or legal person established in the Union that places on the market an AI system that bears the name or trademark of a natural or legal person established outside the Union.
label: importer

text: (7) 'distributor' means a natural or legal person in the supply chain, other than the provider or the importer, that makes an AI system available on the Union market without affecting its properties.
label: distributor

text: (3) „Anbieter" eine natürliche oder juristische Person, Behörde, Einrichtung oder sonstige Stelle, die ein KI-System oder ein KI-Modell mit allgemeinem Verwendungszweck entwickelt oder entwickeln lässt und es unter ihrem eigenen Namen oder ihrer eigenen Marke in Verkehr bringt oder in Betrieb nimmt, entgeltlich oder unentgeltlich.
label: provider

text: (4) „Betreiber" eine natürliche oder juristische Person, Behörde, Einrichtung oder sonstige Stelle, die ein KI-System in eigener Verantwortung verwendet, es sei denn, das KI-System wird im Rahmen einer persönlichen, nicht beruflichen Tätigkeit verwendet.
label: deployer

text: (6) „Einführer" eine in der Union niedergelassene natürliche oder juristische Person, die ein KI-System in Verkehr bringt, das den Namen oder die Marke einer außerhalb der Union niedergelassenen natürlichen oder juristischen Person trägt.
label: importer

text: (7) „Händler" eine natürliche oder juristische Person in der Lieferkette, die kein Anbieter oder Einführer ist und ein KI-System auf dem Unionsmarkt bereitstellt, ohne seine Eigenschaften zu verändern.
label: distributor

text: (8) „Akteur" den Anbieter, den Produkthersteller, den Bevollmächtigten, den Einführer, den Händler oder den Betreiber.
label: importer

text: Providers shall ensure that AI systems intended to interact directly with natural persons are designed and developed in such a way that the natural persons concerned are informed that they are interacting with an AI system, unless this is obvious from the circumstances and the context of use.
label: provider

text: A provider who considers that an AI system referred to in Annex III is not high-risk shall document its assessment before that system is placed on the market or put into service.
label: provider

text:
Where a high-risk AI system is related to a product covered by the Union harmonisation legislation listed in Annex I, Section A, only the manufacturer of that product shall be subject to the requirements set out in this Section where the high-risk AI system is integrated in the product as placed on the market or put into service.

3.
label: provider

text:
Providers of high-risk AI systems shall demonstrate the conformity of those systems with the requirements of this Section through a conformity assessment procedure prior to their being placed on the market or put into service, and shall keep the relevant technical documentation up to date.

5.
label: provider

text:
Anbieter von Hochrisiko-KI-Systemen haben die Konformität dieser Systeme mit den Anforderungen dieses Abschnitts im Rahmen eines Konformitätsbewertungsverfahrens nachzuweisen, bevor sie in Verkehr gebracht oder in Betrieb genommen werden, und die einschlägige technische Dokumentation auf dem neuesten Stand zu halten.

5.
label: provider

text: Als unabhängiger Distributor für künstliche Intelligenzsoftware haben wir eine breite Palette von Finanzmarktanalysesoftware auf den EU-Markt gebracht, um das Wachstum des europäischen Marktes zu fördern und ohne unsere eigenen Modifikationen bereitzustellen.
label: distributor

text: Unsere Verantwortung im Distributionssektor für AI in der HR beinhaltet die Bereitstellung von Software zur Unternehmensanalyse, um Mitarbeiterleistungen und -zufriedenheit zu verbessern, ohne dass wir direkt an den Daten beteiligt sind.
